frames.label: 뿌리 모으기
frames.description: 낮게 웅크려 발밑의 작은 뿌리 빛을 모은다

frames.label: 새싹 솟기
frames.description: 발밑에서 둥근 새싹 세 개가 올라온다

frames.label: 꽃 피우기
frames.description: 새싹이 작은 꽃으로 피고 캐릭터가 뿌듯하게 웃는다

stages.name: 이끼콩
stages.prompt: One original tiny earth-element pet named Mossbud, a round moss-green seed creature with two leaf ears, warm amber eyes, short root feet, and one pale sprout on its head. Full body, cute classroom game mascot, consistent proportions and markings.

stages.name: 덩굴몽
stages.prompt: One original medium earth-element pet named Vinepaw, a mossy quadruped with leafy ears, vine-like forelegs, amber eyes, a cream chest patch, and a curled fern tail. Full body, cute classroom game mascot, consistent proportions and markings.

stages.name: 가이아론
stages.prompt: One original evolved earth guardian pet named Gaiaroot, a sturdy gentle forest creature with a broad moss mane, branch antlers tipped with leaves, amber eyes, root-patterned legs, and a fern tail. Full body, heroic but friendly classroom game mascot.

frames.label: 물결 준비
frames.description: 꼬리를 낮추고 앞쪽에 작은 물결 고리를 만든다

frames.label: 여울 질주
frames.description: 짧은 물결을 타고 옆으로 빠르게 미끄러진다

frames.label: 첨벙 착지
frames.description: 둥근 물방울을 튀기며 가볍게 착지한다

stages.name: 물방울이
stages.prompt: One original tiny river-element pet named Dropip, a round sky-blue otter-fish creature with two fin ears, teal eyes, a white belly ripple, and a droplet tail. Full body, cute classroom game mascot, consistent proportions.

stages.name: 여울핀
stages.prompt: One original medium river-element pet named Ripplefin, an agile blue otter-like creature with fin ears, teal eyes, a white ripple chest, webbed paws, and a long ribbon-water tail. Full body, cute classroom game mascot.

stages.name: 리버레인
stages.prompt: One original evolved river guardian pet named Riverain, a sleek blue river-dragon otter with layered fin ears, luminous teal eyes, flowing white ripple markings, webbed paws, and a long curling water-ribbon tail. Full body, friendly heroic mascot.

frames.label: 숨 고르기
frames.description: 가슴의 산호 무늬가 은은하게 빛나며 숨을 고른다

frames.label: 바다 음표
frames.description: 입 앞에 둥근 물방울 음표 세 개가 떠오른다

frames.label: 파도 화음
frames.description: 음표가 작은 원형 파도로 퍼지며 산호 뿔이 반짝인다

stages.name: 산호콩
stages.prompt: One original tiny sea-element pet named Coralbud, a round turquoise seal creature with tiny coral nubs, dark ocean eyes, a peach belly shell, and two flipper paws. Full body, cute classroom game mascot, consistent proportions.

stages.name: 코랄루
stages.prompt: One original medium sea-element pet named Coralo, a turquoise seal-dragon with branching peach coral ears, dark ocean eyes, a shell-pattern chest, broad flippers, and a short wave tail. Full body, cute classroom game mascot.

stages.name: 타이달로스
stages.prompt: One original evolved sea guardian pet named Tidalos, a majestic friendly turquoise seal-dragon with broad branching coral antlers, deep ocean eyes, luminous shell markings, strong flippers, and a curling tidal tail. Full body, heroic classroom mascot.

frames.label: 불씨 모으기
frames.description: 뿔과 꼬리 끝에 주황 불씨를 모으며 몸을 낮춘다

frames.label: 잿불 포효
frames.description: 앞을 향해 귀여운 포효와 함께 별 모양 불씨를 내보낸다

frames.label: 연기 털기
frames.description: 작은 연기 고리를 털어내고 당당하게 선다

stages.name: 잿불콩
stages.prompt: One original tiny volcano-element pet named Cindlet, a round ember-red lizard with one soft charcoal horn, golden eyes, a dark belly patch, and a candle-sized flame tail. Full body, cute classroom game mascot.

stages.name: 화염뿔
stages.prompt: One original medium volcano-element pet named Cinderhorn, a sturdy ember-red lizard with two charcoal horns, golden eyes, glowing lava stripe markings, clawed feet, and a bright flame tail. Full body, cute classroom game mascot.

stages.name: 마그마론
stages.prompt: One original evolved volcano guardian pet named Magmaron, a powerful but friendly magma dragon with swept charcoal horns, golden eyes, glowing lava cracks, broad feet, and a plume-like flame tail. Full body, heroic classroom game mascot.

frames.label: 바람 모으기
frames.description: 작은 날개를 접고 발밑에 구름 한 점을 모은다

frames.label: 구름 한 바퀴
frames.description: 구름 고리를 따라 공중에서 한 바퀴 회전한다

frames.label: 솜구름 착지
frames.description: 작은 솜구름 위에 내려앉아 날개를 활짝 편다

stages.name: 구름콩
stages.prompt: One original tiny sky-element pet named Cloudlet, a round pale-blue bird-kangaroo creature with cloud-soft ears, navy eyes, tiny white winglets, and a puffball cloud tail. Full body, cute premium classroom mascot.

stages.name: 제피윙
stages.prompt: One original medium sky-element pet named Zephywing, a light-blue winged hopper with long cloud ears, navy eyes, layered white wings, slim legs, and a curling cloud tail. Full body, cute premium classroom mascot.

stages.name: 스카이루
stages.prompt: One original evolved sky guardian pet named Skyroo, a graceful blue cloud-griffin hopper with long wind-swept ears, deep navy eyes, broad white feather wings, silver sky markings, and a sweeping cloud tail. Full body, heroic premium mascot.

frames.label: 그림자 납작
frames.description: 몸 아래 그림자가 둥글게 넓어지고 캐릭터가 몸을 낮춘다

frames.label: 그림자 숨기
frames.description: 귀와 눈만 남기고 그림자 안으로 쏙 들어간다

frames.label: 깜짝 등장
frames.description: 작은 보라 별가루와 함께 반대편에서 깜짝 나타난다

stages.name: 그림콩
stages.prompt: One original tiny dark-element pet named Duskit, a round plum-purple cat-bat creature with crescent ears, violet eyes, a charcoal face mask, and a shadow tassel tail. Full body, cute premium classroom mascot.

stages.name: 녹터프
stages.prompt: One original medium dark-element pet named Noctuff, a plush plum cat-bat with tall crescent ears, violet eyes, a charcoal mask and chest, small cape wings, and a long shadow tassel tail. Full body, cute premium mascot.

stages.name: 엄브라울
stages.prompt: One original evolved dark guardian pet named Umbraowl, an elegant owl-cat bat with swept crescent ears, luminous violet eyes, layered shadow wings, silver moon markings, and a flowing mist tail. Full body, heroic but friendly premium mascot.

frames.label: 빛 모으기
frames.description: 가슴의 별 무늬로 작은 금빛 점들을 모은다

frames.label: 프리즘 펼치기
frames.description: 금빛 점이 세 갈래 파스텔 빛으로 나뉘어 펼쳐진다

frames.label: 반짝 인사
frames.description: 별 모양 빛이 터지고 캐릭터가 앞발을 들어 인사한다

stages.name: 반짝콩
stages.prompt: One original tiny light-element pet named Sparkit, a round cream-gold fox kitten with star-shaped ears, warm brown eyes, a glowing chest star, and a short sunray tail. Full body, cute premium classroom mascot.

stages.name: 루미킷
stages.prompt: One original medium light-element pet named Lumikit, a graceful cream-gold fox kitten with pointed star ears, warm brown eyes, a luminous chest star, ribbon-like light whiskers, and a sunray tail. Full body, cute premium mascot.

stages.name: 솔라리온
stages.prompt: One original evolved light guardian pet named Solarion, a majestic friendly cream-gold lion fox with a radiant sun mane, warm brown eyes, prism chest markings, light-ribbon whiskers, and a broad sunray tail. Full body, heroic premium mascot.
